Class AreaValue

java.lang.Object
org.tquadrat.foundation.value.api.ValueBase<Area, AreaValue>
org.tquadrat.foundation.value.AreaValue
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, Comparable<DimensionedValue<Area>>, Formattable, DimensionedValue<Area>
@ClassVersion(sourceVersion="$Id: AreaValue.java 1151 2025-10-01 21:32:15Z tquadrat $") @API(status=STABLE, since="0.1.0") public final class AreaValue extends ValueBase<Area, AreaValue>
A value class for areas.
Author:
Thomas Thrien (thomas.thrien@tquadrat.org)
Version:
$Id: AreaValue.java 1151 2025-10-01 21:32:15Z tquadrat $
Since:
0.1.0

  • Field Details

    • AREA_VALIDATOR

      private static final BiPredicate<Area, BigDecimal> AREA_VALIDATOR

      The validator for areas.

      An area may not be less than 0.

  • Constructor Details

    • AreaValue

      public AreaValue(Area dimension, BigDecimal value)
      Creates a new AreaValue instance.
      Parameters:
      dimension - The dimension.
      value - The value.

    • AreaValue

      public AreaValue(Area dimension, String value) throws NumberFormatException
      Creates a new AreaValue instance.
      Parameters:
      dimension - The dimension.
      value - The value; it must be possible to parse the given String into a BigDecimal.
      Throws:
      NumberFormatException - The provided value cannot be converted into a BigDecimal.

    • AreaValue

      public <N extends Number> AreaValue(Area dimension, N value)
      Creates a new AreaValue instance.
      Type Parameters:
      N - The type of value.
      Parameters:
      dimension - The dimension.
      value - The value.

    • AreaValue

      public AreaValue(Area dimension, LengthValue length, LengthValue width)

      Creates a new AreaValue instance. An area can be determined by multiplication of length and width.

      Parameters:
      dimension - The dimension.
      length - The length.
      width - The width.

    • clone

      public final AreaValue clone()
      Creates a new copy of this value.

      clone in interface DimensionedValue<Area>

      Returns:
      The copy.
